name: Moderna, Inc.
business: Moderna sells mRNA vaccines and therapeutics. Its three commercial products are Spikevax, mNEXSPIKE (COVID-19 vaccines), and mRESVIA (RSV vaccine). It sells to governments, wholesalers, distributors, retailers, and healthcare providers.

exposures.sentence: We currently have three commercial products Spikevax and mNEXSPIKE (our COVID vaccines) and mRESVIA (our vaccine against respiratory syncytial virus (RSV)).
We plan to leverage our global production network, artificial intelligence (AI) and digital tools to improve cost efficiency.

catalysts.event: FDA PDUFA goal date for seasonal flu vaccine (mRNA-1010)
catalysts.sentence: the FDA accepted our BLA for review and assigned a Prescription Drug User Fee Act (PDUFA) goal date of August 5, 2026.

catalysts.event: Completion of U.S. manufacturing expansion in Norwood
catalysts.sentence: Construction for the new drug product manufacturing capability has commenced, with completion targeted in the first half of 2027.

catalysts.event: Start of Phase 3 trial for pandemic influenza vaccine (mRNA-1018)
catalysts.sentence: The Phase 3 trial is expected to begin in early 2026.

catalysts.event: Start of registrational study for MMA therapeutic (mRNA-3705)
catalysts.sentence: mRNA-3705 has been selected by the FDA for the Support for Clinical Trials Advancing Rare Disease Therapeutics (START) pilot program, with a registrational study expected to begin in 2026.

catalysts.event: Potential Phase 2 data readout for mRNA-4359
catalysts.sentence: we expect a potential Phase 2 data readout in 2026.

catalysts.event: Target approvals in Japan and Taiwan for mNEXSPIKE
catalysts.sentence: we have filed and are targeting 2026 approvals in Japan and Taiwan.

tamClaims.claim: Seasonal influenza causes three to five million cases of severe illness and 290,000 to 650,000 deaths each year.
tamClaims.sentence: The WHO estimates that seasonal influenza viruses cause three to five million cases of severe illness and 290,000 to 650,000 deaths each year, resulting in a severe challenge to public health.

tamClaims.claim: Norovirus causes 685 million illnesses and 200,000 deaths annually.
tamClaims.sentence: Annually, norovirus causes an estimated 685 million illnesses and 200,000 deaths, including more than 50,000 deaths in children under the age of five.

tamClaims.claim: Global economic impact of norovirus is estimated at $60 billion per year.
tamClaims.sentence: Globally, the economic impact of norovirus is estimated at $60 billion per year.

tamClaims.claim: RSV causes up to 160,000 hospitalizations and 10,000 deaths per year in US adults 65+.
tamClaims.sentence: RSV infection causes up to 160,000 hospitalizations and up to 10,000 deaths per year in adults aged 65 years or older in the United States.
